gemma4-assistant E2B drafter — FUSED PRODUCT-PATH proof (libelizainference.dylib, ABI v9)
==========================================================================================
This is the desktop product path — NOT llama-server. The harness
(fused-ffi-harness.ts) drives the plugin's own bun:ffi binding
(src/services/voice/ffi-bindings.ts loadElizaInferenceFfi) against the
freshly rebuilt build-desktop-metal/bin/libelizainference.dylib:
eliza_inference_llm_stream_open with mtp_drafter_path set -> the fused
separate-drafter DRAFT_MTP engine (LLAMA_CONTEXT_TYPE_MTP draft context,
ctx_other = target context, shared KV / target tok_embd).

host    : Apple M4 Max, Metal, bun, greedy (temperature 0), maxTokens 96, ctx 4096
target  : /tmp/vision/gemma4/bundles/2b/text/eliza-1-2b-128k.gguf (gemma4, n_embd 1536)
drafter : /tmp/mtp/bundles/2b/mtp/drafter-2b.gguf (gemma4-assistant, 49 tensors,
          block_count 4, embedding_length 256 -> out 1536)
window  : draftMin=1 draftMax=1 (the shipped catalog window)

capability probes: llmStreamSupported=true llmMtpSupported=true tokenizeSupported=true
drafter load     : clean — no tensor/KV mismatch; "common_speculative_init: adding
                   speculative implementation 'draft-mtp'"; set_embeddings_pre_norm=1

prompt                       baseline      MTP           drafted accepted acceptance
counting-to-twenty           78-88 tok/s   96-106 tok/s  27      22       0.815
weekdays                     75-77 tok/s   86-93 tok/s   11      10       0.909
                                                         ------  ------   -----
TOTAL                                                    38      32       0.842
speedup ~1.15-1.23x wall (prefill+decode) at draftMax=1; matches the
llama-server measurement (0.84 acceptance) in draft-acceptance-bench.txt.

output coherence: both MTP outputs coherent. weekdays output is byte-identical
to the greedy baseline across repeated runs.

HONEST FLAG — deterministic one-token tie-flip on counting-to-twenty:
the MTP run emits "... Fifteen, Sixteen,, Eighteen ..." (skips "Seventeen",
n=48 vs 49). Reproduced identically across 2 runs. All tokens after the flip
match the baseline exactly, so draft-rollback/KV retraction is correct; this
is the target's own batched-verify logits (n_tokens=2 Metal kernels) flipping
a near-tie argmax vs single-token decode — a known speculative-decode numerics
artifact, not a drafter tensor/KV mapping defect (a mapping defect produces
garbage + near-zero acceptance, not 84% acceptance with clean continuation).

teardown: streams + ctx close cleanly ("[harness] clean shutdown"); a known
GGML Metal residency-set assert fires later in __cxa_finalize at process exit
(ggml-metal-device.m:637), after all inference work completed — exit-time
only, upstream teardown-order issue, unrelated to MTP.

Full log: fused-ffi-run.txt. Harness: fused-ffi-harness.ts.
